items.headline: इस्लामाबाद में हुए धमाके पर दुनिया भर के नेताओं ने क्या कहा
whyItMatters: इमेज स्रोत, Robert Cianflone/Getty Images आईसीसी मेन्स टी20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026 का आगाज़ हो गया है. इसकी मेज़बानी भारत और श्रीलंका कर रहे हैं. टूर्नामेंट का पहला मैच श्रीलंका में नीदरलैंड्स और पाकिस्तान के
summaryParagraphs: इमेज स्रोत, Robert Cianflone/Getty Images आईसीसी मेन्स टी20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026 का आगाज़ हो गया है. इसकी मेज़बानी भारत और श्रीलंका कर रहे हैं. टूर्नामेंट का पहला मैच श्रीलंका में नीदरलैंड्स और पाकिस्तान के बीच चल रहा है. नीदरलैंड्स ने पाकिस्तान को 148 रनों का टारगेट दिया है. इस मैच में पाकिस्तान ने टॉस जीतकर पहले गेंदबाज़ी करने का फ़ैसला किया. बल्लेबाज़ी करने उतरी नीदरलैंड्स की टीम ने 147 रन बनाए, टीम 19.5 ओवर में ऑल आउट हो गई. टी20 वर्ल्ड कप का दूसरा मैच स्कॉटलैंड और वेस्ट इंडीज़ के बीच कोलकाता में दोपहर 3 बजे से खेला जाएगा. वहीं टूर्नामेंट का तीसरा मैच भारत और अमेरिका के बीच शाम सात बजे से मुंबई में होगा. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Highest FD interest rates for senior citizens
whyItMatters: Listen to this article in summarized format Listen ET Online FD interest rates As the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has maintained a repo rate at 5.5% in its Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) meeting, ban
summaryParagraphs: Listen to this article in summarized format Listen ET Online FD interest rates As the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has maintained a repo rate at 5.5% in its Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) meeting, banks and Small Finance Banks (SFBs) are unlikely to slash interest rates on their fixed deposit (FD) schemes soon. However, the transmission of previous RBI repo rate cuts into FD interest rates is yet to be over. Amid such a scenario, senior citizens who rely on FD investments for regular income may experience a decrease in their interest income. However, if they have an existing FD investment, their returns will remain unaffected until maturity since they will get the rates decided at the time of lock-in. But if banks or SFBs slash FD rates, senior citizens may get a low maturity amount. Let us check the highest senior citizen FD interest rates top banks and SFBs are offering. summaryParagraphs: App-based transport workers nationwide protested on February 7, demanding fair incomes and protection against exploitation. Unions cited falling earnings and rising costs, urging governments to implement minimum base fares as mandated by 2025 guidelines. The strike highlighted concerns over unilateral pricing by platforms and financial burdens from device changes, with workers seeking statutory protections. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.

items.headline: Exclusive: 'Until he plays Tests, he isn’t a big 'cricketer'—Sooryavanshi’s father
whyItMatters: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smoked 15 sixes and 15 fours at a strike rate of 218.75 during a brutal and breathtaking knock in the U-19 World Cup final against England at the Harare Sports Club in Zimbabwe. B
summaryParagraphs: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smoked 15 sixes and 15 fours at a strike rate of 218.75 during a brutal and breathtaking knock in the U-19 World Cup final against England at the Harare Sports Club in Zimbabwe. Back home in his village in Bihar’s Samastipur district, his family had hardly caught any sleep, while his coach’s phone in Patna was buzzing with congratulatory messages and strange requests: “Sir, mera beta do saal ka hai, usko cricketer Vaibhav bana dijiye (My son is two years old, make him like Vaibhav).” For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.

items.headline: Think. Over the week
whyItMatters: The analysis of the Union Budget for 2026-27 was our Editorial section’s highlight of last week. The thrust on infrastructure (rail and freight), proposals on rare earth corridors, semiconductors and
summaryParagraphs: The analysis of the Union Budget for 2026-27 was our Editorial section’s highlight of last week. The thrust on infrastructure (rail and freight), proposals on rare earth corridors, semiconductors and AI were welcomed. That this Budget was shorn of populism was also appreciated. The Budget’s credible and conservative architecture was welcomed, overall the boxes were ticked. The progress on India-US trade deal was another major topic for comment in our Editorial section. Though the agreement is yet to signed, US President’s announcement of cutting tariffs from 50% to 18% on Indian exports is good news. However, conflicting announcements on agricultural trade remains a matter of concern. On the 16th Finance Commission recommendations, our Editorial says that the panel has struck a fair balanc For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Business Line.

items.headline: 'Said he would reach in 10mins': How Delhi biker '200 metres from home' fell into killer pit
whyItMatters: In a heartbreaking turn of events in Janakpuri, 25-year-old call centre worker Kamal Dhyani was found dead in a construction pit. Just moments before he went missing, he had assured his family he was
summaryParagraphs: In a heartbreaking turn of events in Janakpuri, 25-year-old call centre worker Kamal Dhyani was found dead in a construction pit. Just moments before he went missing, he had assured his family he was only ten minutes from home. His motorcycle was located nearby, raising serious questions about community safety and the response time to his prior lack of communication. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.
